CONTENT.Career: On 27 April 2012, he scored his first goal in Ligue 2 with Guingamp in a 1–0 win over CS Sedan Ardennes. During the last 5 games of the 2011–2012 season, he scored 3 goals and added 2 assists, convincing his club to offer him a new two-year-contract.On 25 September 2018, Charrier signed for Les Herbiers VF.

SUMMARY: Charly Charrier (born 27 May 1986) is a French footballer who plays as a midfielder for La Roche VF.
